scripts.build: vp run -t @view-server/client#build && vp run -t @view-server/column-live-view-engine#build && vp run -t @view-server/effect-utils#build && vp pack
scripts.test: vp run -t @view-server/client#build && vp run -t @view-server/column-live-view-engine#build && vp run -t @view-server/effect-utils#build && vp test run --coverage --typecheck
